corrections.note: Printed word is ὄζμην, not ὄνομιν.

corrections.current: 18ἐν λόγῳ αὐτοῦ ἔστη ὡς θιμωνιὰ ὕδωρ,
corrections.correct: 17ἐν λόγῳ αὐτοῦ ἔστη ὡς θιμωνιὰ ὕδωρ,
corrections.note: This line continues verse 17; the printed verse number 18 begins at ἐν προστάγματι αὐτοῦ.

corrections.current: 20ἀπὸ τοῦ αἰῶνος εἰς τὸν αἰῶνα ἐπέβλεψεν,
corrections.correct: 20ἀπὸ τοῦ αἰῶνος εἰς τὸν αἰῶνα ἐπέβλεψεν,
corrections.note: Printed accent appears as ἐπέβλεψεν; retained here only to note image supports this form. No substantive change.
The trailing ℵAC is not printed here; apparatus entry ends after the parenthesis.

corrections.current: εις τι] εστι C* (εις τι Cᵃ)
corrections.correct: εις τι] εστι C* (εις τι Cᵃ)
corrections.note: Superscript corrector mark may be c.a rather than Cᵃ; left unchanged due to uncertainty.

corrections.correct: η ευδοκια] om η ℵ* c.a
corrections.note: Printed siglum includes star before c.a.

corrections.current: οφθαλμων] μʼ ο sup ras A
corrections.correct: οφθαλμων] μʼ γ sup ras A
corrections.note: The superscript letter after μʼ appears to be γ, not ο.
C is printed separately after a divider, not as part of ℵAC cluster.

corrections.current: ζωη] ψυχην ( l pr) pr και ℵc.a AC
corrections.correct: ζωη] ψυχην (ι pr) pr και ℵc.a AC
corrections.note: Parenthetical letter is iota, not Latin l.

uncertain.note: Superscript corrector after C in '(εις τι Cᵃ)' is small and could be represented differently; current transcription may be acceptable.

uncertain.location: APPARATUS line 20, sigla spacing around θαυμαστον
uncertain.note: Image is slightly cramped; separation of ℵA and C is likely but not fully certain.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one word misread in v.14 and one marginal/page line number was captured as a verse number before v.18. Apparatus has several small siglum/letter issues.
